A post-apocalyptic cyberpunk cityscape at night, top-down isometric perspective background art for a 2D game. Dark industrial wasteland with crumbling buildings, broken neon signs glowing in cyan and hot pink, electric cables, scattered debris and smoke. No characters, no UI buttons, no text except atmospheric neon signs with random symbols. Deep charcoal background #1A1A2E, neon accent lights: cyan #00FFFF, hot pink #FF2D9B, lime green #AAFF00, purple #9B5DE5. Moody atmospheric fog, rain-wet ground reflecting neon lights. Wide 16:9 landscape composition, 2D flat illustration style, slightly dark left and right edges to frame center content. High contrast neon-on-dark, comic book aesthetic.
